strengths: 17+ years of continuous software engineering experience across web, embedded, mobile, and high-throughput distributed systems, satisfying the 15-year minimum

Founder of GISCollective demonstrates entrepreneurial initiative: built and deployed an open-source geo-data platform to production users (Green Map NGO), fulfilling the startup-within-larger-org preferred qualifier
Current role at re:cinq includes hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks), indicating an active pivot toward AI engineering
concerns: AI expertise is confined to ~14 months (April 2025–present); no ML/AI product development, recognized AI platforms, or AI research appear across the preceding 16 years of the career, directly undercutting the 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms' requirement
No advanced degree in an AI-related field; holds a BS in Computer Science and a BA in Fine Arts — the role's preferred Master's/PhD qualifier is unmet

Entire career history is individual-contributor and project-scoped; no evidence of advising strategic enterprise customers, shaping cloud/AI platform roadmaps, or operating at a director-level span of influence
response.justification: The role requires a recognized AI expert capable of advising strategic customers and influencing cloud/AI platform direction at a director level. Bogdan meets the tenure bar (~17 years) and demonstrates genuine engineering range, but his AI engagement is limited to a single role begun in April 2025; no AI-powered products, ML platforms, or AI research appear across his prior career. GISCollective shows entrepreneurial drive but is a geospatial data tool with no AI component. The advanced-degree preference and the strategic-advisory, customer-facing, and organizational-influence competencies that define the role are entirely absent from the résumé. The gap between his current profile and the role's core requirements is too wide to bridge in an interview.
